name: joel-skills
description: Joel's personal skills: focus-toolkit (ADHD-friendly focus tools), joel-brand (personal brand styling), qc-gate (deliverable QC check), client-intake (client onboarding interview + profile), discovery-form (client-facing discovery questionnaire + scope mapping), case-study (build-to-portfolio write-up), and ediscovery-research (docs-grounded eDiscovery/EDRM research + cert study).
